overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic industrial construction site beneath a massive overpass. The camera moves from a covered walkway through a glass-enclosed section with harbor views, circles around heavy machinery in an open yard, and exits onto a city street with digital billboards. High-quality game engine footage with cyberpunk aesthetic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty industrial construction site beneath a massive overpass into a vibrant, futuristic city street. It begins on a dirt path under the concrete structure, passing a pedestrian signal before gliding into a glass-enclosed walkway that reveals towering yellow harbor cranes outside. As the ground transitions from dirt to concrete, the camera exits the enclosure into a wide-open industrial yard under a cloudy sky, circling a dirt mound to get closer to the massive machinery. The scene then shifts back into a dimly lit corridor flanked by metal scaffolding and a construction worker in a yellow vest before finally emerging from the covered walkway onto a bustling city street. This final transition opens up to a landscape of digital billboards, futuristic buildings with yellow accents, and moving traffic with pedestrians crossing the road.
